/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -O3  -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.2.4 -Wno-parentheses -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils/dataloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils/helper.cpp.o -o test  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/shared/gpfs/home/billdai2/local/openFHE/openfhe-development/build/lib -fopenmp libencryption.a libcnn.a /mnt/shared/gpfs/home/billdai2/local/cnpy/lib/libcnpy.so -lz /mnt/shared/gpfs/home/billdai2/local/openFHE/openfhe-development/build/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.2.4 /mnt/shared/gpfs/home/billdai2/local/openFHE/openfhe-development/build/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.2.4 /mnt/shared/gpfs/home/billdai2/local/openFHE/openfhe-development/build/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.2.4 -ldl -fopenmp
